description.unified: Charges a total of 2 time(s). On the first attack, moves behind the enemy and deals Physical DMG, knocking them down for [3 sec->1sec]. On the second attack, moves behind the enemy with the highest ATK, dealing Physical DMG, knocking them down for [???->1sec], and increasing Physical DMG taken by [25%->20%] for [10 sec->4sec].

Removes all negative effects from self and grants all allies [Reading the Wind] for [15 sec->7sec], increasing ATK by {0} and Physical Evasion by [250->300]. If a target under [Reading the Wind] successfully evades, all allies’ Crit DMG is increased by [5%->2%] for [20 sec->7sec]. This effect stacks up to 10 times.
Attacks enemies in a circular area around you, dealing Physical DMG and stunning them for [3 sec->1.8sec]. This skill gains an additional [500->800] Physical Defense Penetration.

On Normal Attack, has a [15%->20%] chance to deal additional Physical DMG, stunning the target for [1 sec->0.5sec], and increasing Physical DMG taken by [(added) 15%] for [(added) 5sec]. This skill ignores the target’s damage reduction effects. [(removed) increases Naila's DEF Penetration by 150 and DEF by ???].

dark.unified: On each attack, reduces the target’s Mana by 250.

light.unified: Mana cost increases by [1->1000], and when triggered, removes all beneficial effects from all enemies.

dark.unified: Reduces the target’s Healing Effectiveness by [40%->20%] for [10 sec->7 sec].

light.unified: Cooldown of all skills is reduced by 2 sec. [(removed) DMG of normal attacks increases by 25%].

dark.unified: At the start of battle, increases Defense Penetration by 400 for [20 sec->10 sec] and grants immunity to status ailments for [10 sec (Guild War only)->5 sec]. The Defense Penetration increase cannot be dispelled.

description.unified: [Fierce Wind] increases DMG by 50% and P.DMG taken by the target by {0}% for 4 sec.
[Wind Reading] All effects become irremovable and upon activation, heals own HP equal to {0}% of Max HP.
[Dive Bomb] Reduces Mana Cost by 1 and increases DMG by {0}%.
[Tornado Strike] increases the chance of dealing additional DMG by [10%->5%], and if the target is a [Guild War hero->Hero], deals additional P.DMG equal to {0}% of the target's Max HP.

dark.unified: On Normal Attack, increases Attack by 3% and Physical Evasion Chance by [30->35] for 10 sec. This effect stacks up to 10 times.

description.unified: On hit, increases the target's Physical Damage taken by {0}% and reduces Status Ailment Resistance by [ {1}->100] for [10 sec->{1} sec]. If the target is a boss, damage dealt to the boss is increased by {4}%, and this boss damage increase effect stacks up to 10 times.

Summons the soul of Cursed Claw, Baroro for 10sec, increasing own ATK by 40%. During the duration, every 3sec, deals Physical Damage to enemies in front. Hit enemies are inflicted with [Curse of Baroro] for 5sec, increasing P.DMG taken by [30%->20%] and reducing Heal Rate by [30%->20%]. If the target is a Boss, the effect of [Curse of Baroro] is increased by [1.5 times->2 times].

1.from: Petrifies the hit enemy for 3 sec.
1.to: Petrifies the hit enemy for 1 sec.
1.unified: Petrifies the hit enemy for [3 sec->1 sec].

2.from: Changes Skill Activation requirements to 4 times and increases the duration of the soul by 3 sec.
2.to: Changes Skill Activation Requirements to 4 times and increases the duration of the soul by 3 sec.
2.unified: Changes Skill Activation Requirements to 4 times and increases the duration of the soul by 3 sec.
